macro.title: Higher Mortgage Rates Push Pending Home Sales Down for Second Straight Week
macro.what: Some would-be homebuyers are hesitating as housing costs rise and the ongoing Iran war makes the economy feel shaky
macro.why: Rates & inflation shape discount rates and housing affordability.
macro.market: Lower rates support demand/valuations; higher rates pressure builders/REITs and slow transactions.

macro.title: 29% of U.S. Homebuyers Paid Cash in March–the Lowest Share For That Month Since 2020
macro.what: With hundreds of thousands more home sellers than buyers in the market, fewer house hunters feel inclined to make cash offers to stand out in bidding wars
macro.why: Relevant development for housing and markets.
macro.market: Watch second-order effects across builders, lenders, and REITs.

macro.title: Mortgage Rates Remain Tied to Iran War, Oil Prices

housing.title: Investor Home Purchases Fall to Lowest Level Since 2020
housing.what: Elevated housing costs, a slower-than-usual housing market and a cooling rental market are squeezing potential returns for U.S
housing.why: Rent moves feed shelter inflation and multifamily fundamentals.
housing.market: Rising rents help MF REITs; falling rents ease inflation but pressure NOI.
